mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is falling on a 3-month basis, discount rates and recession fears both ease, lifting equity valuations and supporting positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: If FEDFUNDS declines over 3 months but S&P 500 forward 20-day returns are negative in more than 55% of triggered observations, or rolling 2-year Rank IC stays below 0.03, reject the hypothesis.

mechanism_narrative: A CPIAUCSL inflation acceleration above the prior 6-month trend raises the odds of tighter policy and multiple compression, which produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation rises above its prior 6-month average
failure_condition: Reject if inflation-upturn triggers are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the sign flips to positive in a stable way across rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE combined with flat or declining PAYEMS indicates labor-market deterioration and weaker household income expectations, which should pressure S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: If the combined UNRATE-up and PAYEMS-flat/down condition does not produce lower 20-day returns than either series alone, or if triggered outcomes are not negative in at least 55% of observations, reject the interaction.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in RSAFS signals stronger consumer spending and revenue growth, which supports positive S&P 500 returns over the following quarter as earnings expectations improve.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month changes in RSAFS fail to precede above-median 60-day S&P 500 returns, or if the forward-return spread versus negative RSAFS changes is not positive.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in INDPRO below its recent trend signals weakening industrial activity and cyclical earnings risk, which should lead to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month change turns negative after being positive or flat for the prior 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if trend breaks in INDPRO are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns more than 55% of the time, or if the sign relationship is unstable across rolling 24-month windows.

mechanism_narrative: When HOUST rises sharply while GDPC1 growth is weak, the market reads the housing sector as a leading indicator of domestic demand stabilization, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: HOUST 3-month growth turns positive while GDPC1 annualized growth is below its 2-year median
failure_condition: Reject if the joint housing-up / GDP-weak condition does not outperform either proxy alone, or if forward 20-day returns are not positive in at least 55% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle slowdown, a simultaneous rise in UNRATE and deceleration in PAYEMS implies deteriorating employment momentum that should produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor deterioration signal fails to predict negative 60-day returns in at least 55% of observations, or if its rolling 3-year Rank IC is consistently below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation is elevated and policy rates remain restrictive, equity multiples compress and the S&P 500 should underperform over the next month; the signal is strongest when CPIAUCSL is rising while FEDFUNDS is above its recent neutral range.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month inflation is positive and FEDFUNDS is above 2.0%
failure_condition: Reject if elevated-inflation plus restrictive-rate regimes do not produce lower 20-day returns than non-triggered periods, or if the sign becomes positive in more than 40% of triggered cases.
